title: Space Intelligence: Portal Space Systems and the Solar-Thermal Propulsion Thesis
oneSentenceClaim: Solar-thermal propulsion — sunlight concentrated onto a 3D-printed heat exchanger that heats cheap ammonia propellant — is the only architecture that delivers both chemical-class thrust and electric-class efficiency, making it the sole viable option for the responsive, repeatable maneuvering that 1.2 million planned orbital assets will require.
